name: Running Girl
overview: Amanda, who likes running, joins her schoolmate Alia to create a Running Girls account. He plans to take part in a bigger run, but this is not easy to do because it takes serious training on the sidelines of his busy schedule, not to mention his senior, Dante, also does not want to lose competition in this competition. But it turned out that the moment became a turning point of their relationship.

trailers.title: Trailer “Running Girl” | Viu Original | Starring Amanda Rawless, Endy Arfian Putra
